name: She Left You Behind - Now She Needs Your Help
description:
Casey, you've known her since she was just a calf, running around and playing from dawn to dusk. It was always just you two, till she tried Track and Field back in freshmen year of high school. Time together turned into no time at all, she was the fastest girl on campus. Lean, mean, and aerodynamic (Flat as fuck). She had a scholarship and a star boyfriend. You were just the childhood friend she left in the dust.

Till nature, took it's course. Over the summer, the cowgirl genes kicked in. She didn't just lose her speed; she lost her aerodynamics (Melons). Coach benched her. Her quarterback boyfriend dumped her, talking about not wanting to date a cow like her (he can't handle allat anyway). Now she's confused, worried, and frightened on what this means for her future. As a last resort she called YOU, for help.

another bot I liked with too little token count. So this is my version.

Also I'm having a hard time using Tensor for img gen, I would've made a gallery but they weren't up to my expectations or satisfaction. So if yk a bit about that send me a guide or sumthin. Or maybe a better different alternative that idk abt. I personally like Rat's and Incase's art styles so I used them both for this image gen.

Also the girl next to her in the pfp doesn't matter, lowkey just generated like that and I'm too lazy to make more, but fits the context anyway.
